message:
feat(extras): form error display below fields and text effects 2D color

Forms:
- Render validation errors on dedicated line below each field (was inline)
- Per-field ValidationErrorState for animation and accessibility
- Dynamic row height calculation: 1 line for field, +1 if error present
- Scroll logic now accounts for variable row heights
- Sync error display state (show/hide) with form validation state
- Added row_to_string() test helper and error_renders_below_field test

Text Effects (StyledText):
- Promote char_color_2d() from test-only to public method
- Implement full 2D coordinate support for all text effects
- Proper vertical gradient, radial gradient, and diagonal gradient with
  correct t_x/t_y normalization based on actual dimensions
- Scanline effect with proper row-based detection using is_multiple_of()
- Consistent effect application order with alpha multiplier accumulation
- Remove redundant #[cfg(test)] wrapper around char_color_2d impl
- Use is_multiple_of() for scanline row detection (clearer intent)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
